## TRM1.2. Terminal capacity incentive scheme

In the first year of RP4, with an ATFM arrival delay of 0.04 min/arr, Hungary **achieved the national target** of 0.1 min/arr. The KPI is beyond the end of the bonus sliding range for the incentive scheme, meaning that **the maximum bonus of 1.0%** applies. As such, the NSA computes a bonus of HUF 109,462,113.62.
